description: Trumpnomics (TN) is a creative ATC-20 utility coin for fair markets, productive growth, oil and coal production, and value-driven participation based on the Greatest President Trump’s America First philosophy. Dedicatedly launched on AtlantisChain – the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time – TN enables instant finality, fixed ultra-low fees, and AI contracts, driving it forward with unmatched momentum across the global Web3 space.
name: Trumpnomics
